  "findings": [
    "DP impulse lines sloped incorrectly for the process service",
    "Gas taps installed below the pipe centerline",
    "Liquid taps installed on top of the pipe"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-route and re-slope the impulse lines according to API RP 551 guidelines",
    "Relocate the process taps to the correct orientation (gas taps on top/upper 60 degrees, liquid taps on the side/lower 60 degrees)"
  ],
  "rationale": "The DP transmitter impulse lines are installed with incorrect slopes and tap orientations. For gas service, taps must be on top to prevent liquid accumulation in the lines. For liquid service, taps must be on the side to prevent gas pocket entrapment. This classic error will cause measurement inaccuracies and plugging.",
  "references": [
    "API RP 551",
    "Manufacturer installation manuals"
  ]
}
